docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $718.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, MUN WUT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, MUN WUT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-06-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HONG, MUN WUT $718.90 PRINCIPAL, $47.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $766.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLTFF;TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 20 DAYS;EXEMPT;TO FOLDER GIVEN TO SUP.FOR COURT'S DECISION.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE OF JUN-18-2003, GRANTED
MOTION VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HONG, MUN WUT HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ENTERED ON JUNE 6, 2003 IS CORRECTED TO ORDER THAT THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-18-2003, GRANTED
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT HONG, MUN WUT
